(1) This is an Allen-Bradley Micro820 Programmable Logic Controller (PLC). It's used to control and automate industrial processes.

(2) The most likely cause of the exception code 02 could be a a hardware failure or a misconfiguration in the PLC's settings.

(3) The tech should first check the PLC's status and configuration settings to ensure everything is correctly set up. If the issue persists, a tech should replace the PLC or check the wiring connections.
